info.title: runfile
info.description: Run C# code from remote locations using: dnx runfile [host/]owner/repo[@ref][:path]

options.name: --dnx-aot
options.description:
Enable dotnet AOT defaults for run file.cs. Defaults to
false.
--dnx-alias ALIAS Assign an alias on first usage which can be used instead
of the full ref.

arguments.name: REPO_REF
arguments.description:
Reference to remote file to run, with format [host/]owner/repo[
@ref][:path]
host optional host name ([gist.]
github.com|gitlab.com|dev.azure.com, default: github.com)
@ref optional branch, tag, or commit (default: default branch)
:path optional path to file in repo (default: program.cs at repo
root)
